Class TuiView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.tui.TuiView
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerHandler
public final class TuiView extends Object implements ServerHandler
Text view. Receives server messages on the reader/RMI thread and prints them to the terminal; user input is read by TuiRunner and forwarded to the VirtualServer. No game logic here — rendering and input only.

      public void requestReconnect()
      End-game menu's back: stop the loop but signal the runner to reopen a session.

    • replayHistoricalLeaderboard

      public void replayHistoricalLeaderboard()
      Re-prints the cached leaderboard; the channel is already closed at this point.

    • echoPickOrder

      public void echoPickOrder(List<String> ids)
      Echoes the pick order before sending it: resolves each id against the latest known board and colors each token by detail type. Order matters (Builder→Building gets a discount, Building→Builder doesn't), so the echo lets the player catch a typo before seeing the server's reply. Unknown ids are marked with (?).

    • renderCardCheck

      public void renderCardCheck(String cardId)
      'check ': looks the card up across every visible source — the offer rows on the board and every player's tribe / buildings — and prints full info plus a human-readable effect description.

      Searched in this order so a board card wins over a tribe card with the same id (shouldn't happen in practice, but keeps results predictable): upper row, lower row, then each player's tribe characters and buildings.

    • onServerMessage

      public void onServerMessage(ServerMessage message)
